DIANA M. SACA, ESQ., (415)505-5003, FOR PLAINTIFFS/CROSS DEFENDANTS, DIANA M. SACA, THE LAW OFFICES OF DIANA M. SACA, JENNIFER HAGAN, THE HAGAN LAW FIRM
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS/CROSS DEFENDANTS DIANA SACA, JENNIFER HAGAN'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5 BECAUSE CROSS PLAINTIFF CANNOT PLEAD HARASSMENT BASED ON MEMBERSHIP IN A PROTECTED CLASS. AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7 BECAUSE IT IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION THOUGH CROSS PLAINTIFF MAY PLEAD THE ELEMENTS OF ALTER EGO TO ASSERT SACA'S LIABILITY FOR OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 BECAUSE ONLY SACA IS NAMED AND SHE DID NOT DEMURRED. SUSTAINED AS TO ALLEGATION THAT THE LAW FIRM OR HOGAN IN HER CAPACITY AS AN ATTORNEY CONSPIRED OR ACTED AGAINST THE INTERESTS OF CROSS-PLAINTIFF GIVEN THE FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1714.10. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL OTHER CLAIMS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 (301/PJB)
